subcodes.title: Words to Baroness Bertha Von Suttner, spoken on 1913-04-23
subcodes.first_line: One of the greatest teachings of Bahá'u'lláh is in regard to international peace. We must not lose our hope and courage. The beginning of a downpour of rain is only a few drops.
subcodes.subjects: @nationalism; love of country, @unity; oneness of humanity, @universal peace; world unity, @progress and the continual ascent of material civilization, @growth and progress is gradual and according to capacity
